explanationZhTw: 「監禁；囚禁狀態」。這裡指他被關押的過程或期間，不是一般抽象的「困難時期」。
generatedExample: Her imprisonment lasted for three years.

explanationZhTw: 「下落；所在位置」。這裡不是複數地點，而是問或知道自己在什麼地方。
generatedExample: The police asked about his whereabouts last night.

explanationZhTw: 「沒有窗戶的」。用來描述建築物或房間，強調封閉、難以辨認方向。
generatedExample: We stayed in a windowless room for the meeting.

explanationZhTw: 「氣壓」。這是科學或環境相關用語，指空氣對物體表面的壓力。
generatedExample: The air pressure dropped before the storm.

explanationZhTw: 「在地面以下」。這裡是位置描述，表示空間比地表更低，常用在地下室或地牢。
generatedExample: The storage room is below ground level.

explanationZhTw: 「審問；盤問」。比一般的問問題更正式、更強硬，常用在警方或政治審訊語境。
generatedExample: The suspect was interrogated for hours.

explanationZhTw: 「在高處；很高的位置」。這裡是字面意思，表示房間靠近屋頂。
generatedExample: Their office is high up on the tenth floor.

explanationZhTw: 「在很深的地方」。這裡是字面上的深度，不是常見比喻義「內心深處」。
generatedExample: The tunnel went deep down into the hill.

explanationZhTw: 在這裡指「牢房／拘禁室」，不是一般的「細胞」。
generatedExample: The cells in the old prison were small and cold.

explanationZhTw: 指「周圍環境、四周的情況」。
generatedExample: She looked around and noticed her surroundings for the first time.

explanationZhTw: 一種厚實的毛呢布，常用來覆蓋桌面，這裡是綠色桌布材質。
generatedExample: The game table was covered with green baize.

explanationZhTw: 指被綁帶固定成直立姿勢，幾乎完全不能動。
generatedExample: He was strapped upright in the chair before the procedure began.

explanationZhTw: 這裡表示從後方牢牢固定住他的頭，帶有壓制、控制的感覺。
generatedExample: The helmet gripped his head from behind to keep it steady.

explanationZhTw: 「came in」是片語動詞，表示「進來、進入」。在這裡就是指奧布萊恩走進房間。
generatedExample: She came in quietly and closed the door behind her.

explanationZhTw: 這裡表示「曾經／有一次」，指過去某個時間點發生過一次提問。
generatedExample: You asked me once about that book, and I still remember it.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是名詞，意思是「答案」。
generatedExample: I don't know the answer yet.

explanationZhTw: 表示「已經」，強調在說話時之前某件事就已完成或成立。
generatedExample: She has already left for the station.

explanationZhTw: 這是誇張說法，意思是「世界上最糟的事」；重點在強調極度可怕或令人厭惡，不是字面上的全世界排名第一差。
generatedExample: For him, missing the train was the worst thing in the world.

explanationZhTw: 守衛；這裡指負責看守、警戒的人。
generatedExample: The guard stopped us at the entrance.

explanationZhTw: 把它放下；指把手上的東西放到某個地方。
generatedExample: He set it down quietly beside the chair.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是「較遠的」意思，不是「進一步」；指離說話者或主體更遠的那張桌子。
generatedExample: Please put the boxes on the further shelf.

explanationZhTw: 位置；這裡指某人站立時所處的方位或姿勢。
generatedExample: From my position, I could not see the screen.

explanationZhTw: 這裡表示「因人而異、每個人不同」；`varies from ... to ...` 是在說差異會隨對象改變。
generatedExample: The best study method varies from individual to individual.

explanationZhTw: 「活埋」；指人在還活著時被埋入地下，是非常殘酷的死法。
generatedExample: The novel describes a punishment of burial alive.

explanationZhTw: 「刺穿刑／貫穿」；指用尖物刺入身體的殘忍處死方式。
generatedExample: The legend mentions impalement as a medieval punishment.

explanationZhTw: 「微不足道的、沒什麼大不了的」；在這裡用來表示事情本身很小、不嚴重。
generatedExample: What seems trivial now may become important later.

explanationZhTw: 「致命的」；這裡是否定說法 `not even fatal`，意思是「甚至不會致死」。
generatedExample: The injury was serious, but it was not fatal.

explanationZhTw: 這裡用很模糊的說法指代桌上的某個物件，刻意不直接命名。
generatedExample: She stared at the thing on the shelf and tried to guess what it was.

explanationZhTw: 指細長橢圓形或長方形的鐵絲籠；`oblong` 描述外形。
generatedExample: The mouse was kept in an oblong wire cage near the window.

explanationZhTw: 擊劍時戴的護面，這裡用來形容外觀看起來像面罩的部分。
generatedExample: His costume included a fencing mask to hide his face.

explanationZhTw: 指凹面，也就是向內彎曲的那一面。
generatedExample: Place the spoon with the concave side facing up.

explanationZhTw: 表示朝外、向外的方向。
generatedExample: She turned the label outwards so everyone could read it.

explanationZhTw: 表示沿著長邊方向、縱向地。
generatedExample: The board was cut lengthways into two equal strips.

explanationZhTw: 指分隔出來的空間或隔間。
generatedExample: The box has three compartments for different tools.

explanationZhTw: 泛指生物或動物；這裡是對籠中生物的概括稱呼，語氣偏中性或略帶距離感。
generatedExample: A strange creature moved quietly in the dark.

explanationZhTw: 慣用性的誇張說法，表示「世界上最糟的事」；這裡是在強調某件事對某人來說非常可怕。
generatedExample: Public speaking is the worst thing in the world for him.

explanationZhTw: 這裡是「恰好是／剛好是」的意思，不是單純指「發生」。
generatedExample: My favorite fruit happens to be mangoes.

explanationZhTw: 名詞，指「老鼠」；在這句話裡是具體可怕的動物。
generatedExample: There were rats in the old basement.

explanationZhTw: 「預兆性的顫抖」；premonitory 指預示將要發生的事，tremor 是輕微顫抖，合起來強調一種先於意識出現的不安與警兆。
generatedExample: She felt a premonitory tremor before the bad news arrived.

explanationZhTw: 「第一次瞥見」；catch a glimpse of 表示匆匆看見，只看了一眼就留下印象。
generatedExample: I caught my first glimpse of the city from the train window.

explanationZhTw: 「突然領悟、一下子明白」；這裡不是字面上的「沉下去」，而是指某個意思終於被他完全理解。
generatedExample: The truth sank into him only after he read the letter twice.

explanationZhTw: 慣用語，指因極度恐懼而渾身發軟、幾乎站不住，像整個人都失去力氣。
generatedExample: When the examiner called my name, my knees seemed to turn to water.

explanationZhTw: 「cried out」在這裡是「大聲喊叫、喊出來」的意思，屬於常見片語動詞用法。
generatedExample: She cried out when she dropped the glass.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「cracked」不是「破裂」的字面義，而是形容聲音沙啞、發緊、聽起來不穩。
generatedExample: After shouting for hours, his voice sounded cracked.

explanationZhTw: 「impossible」是常用形容詞，表示「不可能的、辦不到的」。
generatedExample: This task is impossible without more time.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `panic` 指「驚恐、恐慌」，比一般的害怕更強烈，帶有失控的感覺。
generatedExample: She felt panic when she could not find her passport.

explanationZhTw: `wall of blackness` 不是字面上的牆，而是指一大片黑暗，營造出夢境裡被包圍、看不見前方的感覺。
generatedExample: He stared into a wall of blackness and could see nothing at all.

explanationZhTw: `roaring` 在這裡不是「吼叫」本身，而是形容聲音非常大、很像咆哮般轟鳴。
generatedExample: A roaring engine shook the whole building.

explanationZhTw: `drag it into the open` 是慣用說法，意思是把隱藏的想法、恐懼或秘密攤開來談。
generatedExample: They finally dragged the argument into the open and talked honestly.

explanationZhTw: 表示「刻意努力去做某事」。這裡暗示 Winston 在壓住情緒，讓自己說話不要發抖或失控。
generatedExample: She made an effort to stay calm during the interview.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 control 不是「控制別人」，而是「把自己的聲音穩住、壓住情緒」。
generatedExample: He tried to control his voice when he answered the question.

explanationZhTw: 表示「必要的、非做不可的」。說話者是在說這件事沒有必要發生。
generatedExample: It is not necessary to bring your laptop to the meeting.

explanationZhTw: schoolmasterish manner 指「像學校老師或教員那樣的語氣／姿態」，帶有一點說教、嚴肅或權威感。
generatedExample: He answered in a schoolmasterish manner, as if he were correcting the class.

explanationZhTw: affected 在這裡不是「受影響」，而是「刻意裝出來的、故作的」；表示他常常故意擺出這種語氣。
generatedExample: She affected indifference, but she was clearly upset.

explanationZhTw: behind someone's back 是慣用語，意思是「在某人不知情時、背著某人」。
generatedExample: They changed the plan behind my back.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是指「顯眼地站在外面」，而是「挺身抵抗、撐住」的意思。
generatedExample: She stood out against the pressure and kept speaking calmly.

explanationZhTw: 形容詞，意思是「難以忍受的、受不了的」。
generatedExample: The summer heat in the tiny room was unendurable.

explanationZhTw: contemplate 表示「仔細想像、思考」；這裡是「連想都不敢想」的意思。
generatedExample: I could not contemplate moving to another country this year.

explanationZhTw: 片語動詞，意思是「慌忙抓住、急抓」。
generatedExample: He clutched at the railing when the bus stopped suddenly.

explanationZhTw: 意思是「承受住、抵住、頂得住」。
generatedExample: This bridge can withstand strong winds.

explanationZhTw: 這裡指「你被要求做的事；你必須做到的事」。
generatedExample: What is required of you now is an honest answer.

explanationZhTw: 「picked up」在這裡表示「拿起、提起」，是很常見的日常片語動詞。
generatedExample: She picked up the box and carried it inside.

explanationZhTw: 「set ... down」表示「把……放下」，是常見的動作片語。
generatedExample: He set the bag down next to the chair.

explanationZhTw: 「baize」是指一種粗毛氈或絨面布，常見於桌面覆布或遊戲桌面，屬於較專門的名詞。
generatedExample: The cards slid easily across the green baize cloth.

explanationZhTw: 這不是字面上的「血在唱歌」，而是用來形容耳中嗡嗡作響、強烈的壓迫感或心跳聲。
generatedExample: After the sprint, he could hear the blood singing in his ears.

explanationZhTw: 「utter」在這裡是強調詞，意思接近「完全的、徹底的」；整個片語表示「極度孤獨」。
generatedExample: She felt utter loneliness after everyone left.

explanationZhTw: 「drenched」原本常指「被浸透、淋濕」，這裡是比喻用法，表示整個景象被陽光完全覆蓋。
generatedExample: The hills were drenched with sunlight in the morning.

explanationZhTw: 「muzzle」是動物的口鼻部，也可指口套；這裡是指老鼠的口鼻部。
generatedExample: The dog lifted its muzzle and sniffed the air.

explanationZhTw: 「rodent」指「囓齒類動物」，是較正式的生物學名詞。
generatedExample: The squirrel is a rodent with sharp front teeth.

explanationZhTw: 「carnivorous」指「食肉的」，常用來描述以肉為主食的動物。
generatedExample: Lions are carnivorous animals.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「quarters」不是「四分之一」，而是指「地區、街區、住宅區」；整句是在說城裡較貧困的區域。
generatedExample: We stayed in the older quarters of the city.

explanationZhTw: 這是慣用說法，意思是把東西徹底啃光、吃光或剝得只剩骨頭，帶有強烈的畫面感。
generatedExample: The mice stripped the fruit to the bones overnight.

explanationZhTw: 「helpless」指「無助的、無法自保的」，在這裡強調人失去防衛能力。
generatedExample: She felt helpless when the power went out.

explanationZhTw: 「outburst」表示突然爆發、猛然出現的一陣強烈聲響或情緒。這裡指的是籠子裡突然爆出的尖叫聲。
generatedExample: There was an outburst of laughter when the teacher told the joke.

explanationZhTw: 「cage」是「籠子」。這裡指關著老鼠的籠子。
generatedExample: The bird was kept in a small cage near the window.

explanationZhTw: 「get at」是片語動詞，這裡表示「碰到、攻擊到」。整句意思是老鼠想隔著隔板互相咬到對方。
generatedExample: The dog kept trying to get at the food on the table.

explanationZhTw: 「partition」是「隔板、隔牆、分隔物」。這裡指把兩邊隔開的薄板。
generatedExample: A glass partition separated the office from the hallway.

explanationZhTw: 「groan」是低沉的呻吟聲；「despair」是絕望。合起來表示一種充滿絕望的低沉聲音。
generatedExample: She let out a groan of despair after seeing the broken screen.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是字面上的「在自己外面」，而是說聲音聽起來像從他自身之外傳來，帶有強烈的感官錯覺。
generatedExample: For a moment, his own voice sounded outside himself, as if someone else were speaking.

explanationZhTw: 「picked up」這裡是片語動詞，意思是「拿起、提起」。在日常英文中很常見，屬於 A2+ 常用表達。
generatedExample: She picked up the box and carried it to the door.

explanationZhTw: 「frantic」在這裡表示「極度慌亂、拼命的」。整個片語「made a frantic effort」強調主角在恐慌中急切掙扎，屬於偏文學、情緒強烈的用法。
generatedExample: He made a frantic effort to call for help before the door closed.

explanationZhTw: 「tear himself loose from the chair」是慣用的動作表達，意思是「拼命掙脫椅子」或「強行擺脫束縛」。這裡不是單純字面上的「撕開」，而是強調奮力逃脫的感覺。
generatedExample: He struggled to tear himself loose from the ropes.

explanationZhTw: 「immovably」是較不常見的副詞，意思是「牢牢地、動也不動地」。這裡用來強調他完全無法移動，帶有強烈的被控制感。
generatedExample: The table was fixed immovably to the floor.

explanationZhTw: lever 是「槓桿、拉桿」；在這裡指控制機關用的拉桿。
generatedExample: Pull the lever to open the gate.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 construction 不是單純「建造」，而是指「結構、構造」；整句是在說你明白這個籠子的結構如何運作。
generatedExample: The construction of this machine is more complex than it looks.

explanationZhTw: slide up 在這裡是「往上滑開、向上移動」，描述門板打開的方式。
generatedExample: The garage door slid up slowly.

explanationZhTw: shoot out of it 是「猛然衝出、噴出」的意思，帶有速度很快、很突然的感覺。
generatedExample: Steam shot out of the pipe.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 bore 不是「無聊」，而是「鑽入、鑽進去」；整個片語強調老鼠會直接鑽進皮肉裡。
generatedExample: The drill bored straight into the wall.

explanationZhTw: burrow 原意是「挖洞、打洞」，這裡用來形容像打洞一樣鑽進臉頰裡，畫面非常殘酷。
generatedExample: The rabbit burrowed through the loose soil.

explanationZhTw: devour 在這裡不是普通的「吃」，而是「吞噬、狼吞虎嚥」；用在這裡會讓動作顯得更暴烈。
generatedExample: He devoured the sandwich in seconds.

explanationZhTw: 「closing in」表示逼近、逐漸接近，這裡是指危險一步步迫近。
generatedExample: The storm is closing in, so we should head home now.

explanationZhTw: 表示極短的時間，通常不到一秒。
generatedExample: He decided in a split second and grabbed the child.

explanationZhTw: 形容悶濕、陳腐的氣味，常用於久未通風的地方。
generatedExample: The old wardrobe gave off a musty smell.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的「brutes」不是單純指粗人，而是用來指兇猛的動物，帶有貶抑和恐懼感。
generatedExample: We could hear the brutes moving in the bushes outside.

explanationZhTw: 表示插入、置於兩者之間；這裡是說他要讓另一個人或身體擋在自己和老鼠之間。
generatedExample: The guard interposed himself between the crowd and the door.

explanationZhTw: phrasal verb，表示「把……隔絕在外／擋住」，這裡是面具把外界景象完全遮住。
generatedExample: The thick curtains shut out the morning light.

explanationZhTw: 用手掌張開的寬度來量距離，屬於很口語、具畫面感的量法，意思是「非常近」。
generatedExample: The shelf was only two hand-spans above my head.

explanationZhTw: 這是帶有擬人和貶抑色彩的比喻，形容一隻又老又髒、看起來像地下污水道裡老怪物般的老鼠。
generatedExample: In the story, the monster was described as an old scaly grandfather of the sewers.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是字面上的「黑色的恐慌」，而是用 black 加強 panic 的壓迫感，表示非常深、非常強烈的恐懼。
generatedExample: A black panic rose in her chest when she heard the door slam.

explanationZhTw: 慣用說法，表示「突然控制住／攫住某人」，這裡指恐懼完全控制了他。
generatedExample: A sudden dread took hold of him before the exam.

explanationZhTw: 「punishment」是指懲罰、處罰。這裡是在談一種歷史上的懲戒方式。
generatedExample: Strict punishment can stop some bad behavior, but it does not always solve the real problem.

explanationZhTw: 「Imperial China」指中國的帝制時期，也就是由皇帝統治的歷史階段。這裡是歷史文化語境中的專有名詞。
generatedExample: Many inventions spread across Imperial China and later influenced other parts of Asia.

explanationZhTw: 「didactically」表示帶有說教、教訓人的語氣或方式。這裡不是日常常見用法，屬於較正式且帶評論色彩的副詞。
generatedExample: He explained the rules didactically, as if everyone in the room were a student.

explanationZhTw: 在這裡不是「關閉」，而是「逼近、逐漸壓過來」；帶出面具正在貼近臉部的壓迫感。
generatedExample: The dark clouds were closing on the city.

explanationZhTw: 在這裡表示「輕輕擦過、掠過」，不是一般的刷洗。
generatedExample: A branch brushed my arm as I walked past.

explanationZhTw: 「寬慰、解脫」；這裡說明他感受到的不是鬆一口氣，而只是希望。
generatedExample: She felt relief when the meeting was canceled.

explanationZhTw: 「明白、意識到」；這裡指他突然看懂了整個局勢。
generatedExample: He understood the warning immediately.

explanationZhTw: 這裡不是單純的「轉移」，而是把自己承受的懲罰轉嫁給別人。
generatedExample: They tried to transfer the blame to a junior employee.

explanationZhTw: 在這裡 thrust 是「猛地塞進、插入」；表示他想把那個人當作盾牌，擋在自己和老鼠之間。
generatedExample: He thrust the note between the pages of the book.

explanationZhTw: 「狂亂地、慌亂地」；形容他失控地大喊。
generatedExample: She searched frantically for her keys.

explanationZhTw: 「一遍又一遍」；固定片語，表示反覆不停。
generatedExample: He repeated the instructions over and over.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `don't care` 不是字面上的「不關心」而已，而是表示「無所謂、隨便你怎麼做都行」，帶出說話者的冷酷與逃避責任。
generatedExample: I don't care what happens as long as we finish on time.

explanationZhTw: `tear ... off` 是片語動詞，基本意思是「猛力撕下、扯掉」。在這裡是暴力威脅的用法，語氣非常強烈。
generatedExample: He tore the old label off the box with one quick pull.

explanationZhTw: `strip her to the bones` 是非常不尋常的說法，字面上是「把她剝到只剩骨頭」，實際上用來加強殘酷、徹底摧毀的感覺。
generatedExample: The storm stripped the hillside to the bones, leaving only bare rock.

explanationZhTw: `strapped in` 指「用帶子固定住、綁在座位上」，這裡表示他仍被牢牢綁在椅子上。
generatedExample: Before the ride started, the children were strapped in tightly.

explanationZhTw: 這裡的 `gulfs` 不是海灣，而是指巨大的空隙、深淵般的空間；用來強調他被推向極遠、極空曠的地方。
generatedExample: The climbers looked into the gulfs between the rocks and decided not to go any farther.

explanationZhTw: `light years distant` 是慣用說法，表示「遠得不得了」或「差很多」，不必真的理解成天文距離。
generatedExample: After a month abroad, the city felt light years distant from his old life.

explanationZhTw: `enveloped` 在這裡表示「包圍、籠罩」，不是一般的「包裝」；黑暗把他整個吞沒了。
generatedExample: Fog enveloped the station, and we could barely see the platform.
